prompt: Use image0 as the exact first frame and preserve its portrait composition, camera angle, subject identity, downward-looking pose, clothing, lighting, and floral background. The first frame shows a young East Asian woman standing outdoors beneath arching branches covered with vivid magenta-purple blossoms. She faces slightly toward the camera with her head lowered, eyes looking down, and a shy closed-mouth smile. She has shoulder-length dark hair with small silver hair clips on one side. She wears a soft pink oversized hoodie with large 'Garfield' script text, heart motifs, and cartoon graphics on the front, light blue jeans, and a tan crossbody bag strap running diagonally across her chest. Her arms are crossed comfortably in front of her body. Behind and around her are blooming purple flower branches, a tree trunk, green foliage, tall grass, and warm golden-hour sunlight with a soft blurred background. In the video, the woman first remains in the same crossed-arm pose and gently raises her head from looking downward. After a brief pause, she slowly turns her head to her right side, shifting her gaze sideways as if noticing the flowers or scenery beside her. Then she turns her head back toward the camera, makes eye contact, uncrosses her right arm, and extends her right hand beside her face to make a playful V-sign peace gesture. Her smile becomes warmer while she holds the V-sign and looks at the camera. Keep the camera static, preserve the same portrait framing, and maintain stable facial identity, pink Garfield hoodie, hair clips, crossbody strap, purple blossoms, tree branches, greenery, warm sunlight, and spatial consistency throughout the motion.
